stemHtml: Which of the following lists of factors influence the climate zone at a particular place on Earth?

options.a: Latitude – air masses – heat exchange from ocean currents – distribution of mountain barriers.
options.b: Strength of tidal activities – distribution of mountain barriers – longitude – air masses.
options.c: Distribution of forests and flora – heat exchange from ocean currents – distribution of mountain barriers – longitude.
options.d: Distribution of forests and flora – latitude – air masses – strength of tidal activities.
